reviews.review_description: When I’m trying to move around, it’s keep disappearing from my boundary. Please help me. I still give it five stars. Please try to help me.
How do you exit to get back to the main screen without completely QUITTING the game???...VERY confusing
I have enough space to play but I don't have any friends with VR add Online Multiplayer

developer_response.body: We will continue to upgrade and hope to have an online version in the near future.

reviews.review_description: This game asks for a minimum 13 x 13 ft play area and there's no way for you to "find a server" like other games. The game requires you to move within your play space rather than with a stick. The video implies that this game is likely meant to be played in an arena setting with all players in the same room.

developer_response.body:
Using a headset we can create an arena to play for free at home. And with a shared-space, co-location technology, we will need big space and need everyone to be in the same space.
https://youtu.be/KrXlsp6v2w4

reviews.review_description: Can you make it so i can plsay with someone from far away like for exsampls add bots or something so i dont need 2 headsets

developer_response.body: Please try the Corona Virus Killer game mode which is for single player.

reviews.review_description: ok well the title is dramatic this game is good and actually fun but you have to move in real life so you need a really big play space and for most of us vr users that’s not possible

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review. Now in the game there are arena sizes from 3m x 4m with the Casual type game with little movement, and a Survival type game PvE roomscale please try again :)

reviews.review_description: How do you even quit the game??

developer_response.body: Let press the Home button on the right controller and close the game.

reviews.review_description: I've gone through all of the steps of registering and everything and still no cigar. After going through all of the hassle with side quest, developer options headset downloads just a waist of time. I went through all of that just to be told my headset is not running the same version  trash!!!!

developer_response.body: Please follow all steps for a successful game operation: https://youtu.be/iJJDlxrCwSk

reviews.review_description:
Absolutely the best for room scale environment, the #1 for VR premises. 
Stable, fast to learn, zero lag, professional and super fast support, everyday growing in new features and scenarios. We are using it from the first release, 2020, and there are no other similar. 
Thanks Holomia.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your support. Your comments are great motivation for our team.

reviews.review_description: you cant even access the mixed reality feature

developer_response.body: Let change the Arena to Mixed Reality at Advanced Setting. See 0"27 of this video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iJJDlxrCwSk

reviews.review_description: All super but would like to additionally get a 5*7 arena, not just 4*4. Also in the "Zombies" mode there are no arenas at all, only mixed reality.

developer_response.body: Thank you. Please follow this guide to customize your arena, place some Enemy portals into your space so zombies can spawn: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cAhBCJast0U

reviews.review_description: It's fun kind of like Minecraft or you that one game or something?

reviews.review_title: Create Room doesn't work. "Time limit ex
reviews.review_description: Really wanted it to work but it wont!

developer_response.body: Please update to the latest version, the previous version from 2021 is no longer usable.
